title: Google Cloud Full Stack Engineer
description:
Avensys is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our service spectrum includes enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation and managed services. Given our decade of success we have evolved to become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail, and supply chain.

We are currently looking to hire Google Cloud Full Stack Engineer.

This is an exciting opportunity to expand your skill set, achieve job satisfaction and work-life balance. More details as below.

JD:

The Google Cloud Full Stack Engineer designs, builds, and operates end to end web applications on GCP, from back end and front end development to integration with Google AI services. This role works closely with the Google Cloud AI Architect to implement secure, scalable, and reliable solutions from initial setup to production support.

Key responsibilities:

• Develop and maintain back end services and APIs (for example, Node.js, Python, Java, or Go) deployed on Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, GKE, or App Engine.

• Build modern front end applications (for example, React, Angular, or Vue) that consume APIs and AI services.

• Implement integrations with Google AI services (for example, Gemini / Vertex AI, Document AI, or other ML endpoints) as part of product features.

• Use core GCP services such as Cloud Storage, Cloud SQL / Firestore / BigQuery, Pub/Sub, and Cloud Logging/Monitoring.

• Contribute to infrastructure as code, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and observability tooling.

• Participate in solution design with the architect, providing implementation details, effort estimates, and risk assessments.

• Diagnose and resolve production issues, improve performance, and enhance security and reliability over time.

Required qualifications

• 3–6+ years of experience as a full stack or software engineer.

• Proficiency in at least one modern back end stack (for example, Node.js/Express, Python/FastAPI, Java/Spring Boot, or Go) and one modern front end framework.

• Hands on experience building and deploying applications on GCP (Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, App Engine, or GKE).

• Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, authentication/authorization (OAuth, JWT), and integration patterns.

• Experience with Git, CI/CD tools, and basic infrastructure as code (Terraform or similar).

• Familiarity with consuming AI/ML services via APIs (LLMs, classification, extraction, search, etc.).

• Good communication skills and ability to work in agile, cross functional teams.

• PreferredExperience with containers (Docker, Kubernetes) and event driven architectures.

• Experience with data engineering or MLOps on GCP.

• Google Cloud Associate or Professional level certification.

WHAT’S ON OFFER

You will be remunerated with an excellent base salary and entitled to attractive company benefits. Additionally, you will get the opportunity to enjoy a fun and collaborative work environment, alongside a strong career progression.

To submit your application, please apply online or email your UPDATED CV in Microsoft Word format to preethi@aven-sys.com. Your interest will be treated with strict confidentiality.

CONSULTANT DETAILS

Consultant Name: Preethi Kanthappan
Reg No: R1765546
Avensys Consulting Pte Ltd
EA Licence 12C5759

Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly in accordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys' privacy policy.

postedCompany.description: Avensys is among the leaders in providing technology enabled business solutions and services. Since inception, Avensys has helped clients use IT more efficiently to improve their operations and profitability, focus on core competencies and achieve business results such as increased agility, innovation and profitable growth. Our in-depth technical knowledge coupled with industry experience and our unique methodologies enable us to successfully deliver and meet our customer’s expectations.
